calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And To Enter Judgmnt
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And To Enter Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside dismissal and to enter judgment (CCP 664.6)" is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
